que: What is the primary purpose of the DefaultTextStyle widget in Flutter?
options: To display a single line of text
To define the default text style for its descendants

que: DefaultTextStyle mainly affects which type of widgets?
options: Text widgets without an explicit style

que: Which design pattern does DefaultTextStyle rely on to propagate styles?
Which widget wraps the Text widgets in the example?
What happens to Text widgets inside DefaultTextStyle that do NOT specify a style?
options: They inherit the style from DefaultTextStyle

que: Which of the following is a common use case of DefaultTextStyle?
options: Applying a consistent text style to a group of widgets

que: Which of the following is another common use case of DefaultTextStyle?
options: Overriding the inherited text style in a subtree
